name: beprepared
description: Disaster preparedness system — household readiness from 72h to 90-day self-sufficiency

scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd api typecheck && bun run --cwd worker typecheck && bun run --cwd frontend typecheck && bun run --cwd shared typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd frontend lint && bun run lint:mermaid
scripts.test: bun run --cwd api test && bun run --cwd frontend test && bun run --cwd shared test
